promotion_reasons: Three rolling market-proxy windows pass uniform, home-prior, and raw-market gates.
Supported calibration bins pass while sparse high-confidence bins remain visible in metrics.
The profile is not stable because the source horizon is still closing/matchday proxy data.

notes: Candidate artifact for the rolling market-proxy benchmark.
Version 0.7.1 adds league-segmented market temperature calibration.
The market-proxy promotion gate passes, but this profile is not eligible as a stable default because it uses closing/matchday proxy data.
This profile should not be presented as true T-48/T-24/T-2/T-1h performance.
